chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1142 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 13-09-2023 Mr. Israr Ali Shah, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate for respondents-SEPCO. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, D.A.G. ***** Learned counsel for respondents-SEPCO has filed a letter viz. Transfer of Funds and submits that differential amount of Rs.1,326,389/- has been transferred to the account of petitioner and grievance of the petitioner has been redressed. Counsel for the petitioner is satisfied. This petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
